# Puragain Water — Home Water Filtration Systems

> Puragain Water is a family-owned water filtration company with over 30 years of experience in the water industry. We install home water filtration systems that remove 99% of contaminants from your tap water.

## Products
- 5-Stage Reverse Osmosis System ($26/month) — removes lead, PFAS, chlorine, bacteria, and 99% of contaminants from your kitchen tap
- 6-Stage Alkaline System ($42/month) — all RO benefits plus alkaline mineral restoration, raises pH to 9.5
- Whole House Filtersorb System ($74/month) — clean water from every tap, shower, and appliance, salt-free conditioning

## What's Included
- Zero money down on all systems
- Free professional installation
- 7-year warranty
- Lifetime servicing plan (annual water testing, annual maintenance, unlimited service calls)
- 24/7 live support

## Company Facts
- 33,000+ families served across the United States
- 30+ years in the water industry
- Family owned and operated
- Based in Escondido, California
